title: About Me
description: Full Stack Developer with 12+ years of experience, specialized in SAP enterprise architectures and modern web development.

items.title: Origins
items.description: Born in Sicily, adopted Roman for {yearsInRome} years. I carry with me the determination of the South and the energy of the Capital.

items.title: Tech Stack
items.description: Java background, now specialized in SAP BTP ecosystem. In personal projects I explore React, Node.js and TypeScript

items.title: Current Role
items.description: SAP BTP Practice Leader at GOTONEXT SRL. I lead a team of 16 professionals in designing cloud and on-premise architectures.
